name: Cocoa Meringue
recipeInstructions:
1. Draw a circle on a sheet of parchment paper or unglazed brown paper using the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan as a guide. Do not use recycled paper.
2. Turn the paper over onto the baking sheet.
3. Beat egg whites in a large bowl at high speed with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form.
4. Gradually add the remaining sugar, cocoa, and cornstarch to the beaten egg whites, mixing gently until combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared circle on the parchment paper.
6. Bake in a 350°F (175°C) oven for about 20-25 minutes, or until set and golden brown.
7. Turn off the heat and let cool completely before removing from the pan.
